title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at SRL Diagnostics Global Group

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at SRL Diagnostics Global Group
jsonLd.description:
SRL Diagnostics Global Group has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Vadodara office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About SRL Diagnostics Global Group:
SRL Diagnostics Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRL Diagnostics Global Group!
